Features Blog GitHub Get Free Plugin
January 29, 2026

Version 0.0.5 Released

Release version 0.0.5 is now available!

✨ New Features

  • Update GroupedGraph styles and add dots background (7f9c56d)
  • Add relationships view and variable cleanup logic (d8ddeee)

🔄 Other Changes

  • Update React and scheduler minified bundles (96849e6)

Installation

To update to this version in Figma:

  1. Go to Plugins > Development > Import plugin from manifest
  2. Select the updated manifest.json file
  3. Or pull the latest code and run npm run build

Getting Started

If you’re new to Winden Tokens, check out our documentation and tutorials.

Have feedback or questions? Open an issue on GitHub
